markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce and discuss publishing processes for DataGrid and Ramp CMS, and review inline CTAs for Galileo.](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [DataGrid publishing uses Webflow CMS, requiring manual input and careful checking due to system bugs](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Ramp uses Sanity CMS for vendor comparison pages, with automated table integration](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Galileo is migrating to a new CMS; current focus is on implementing specific inline CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1847.0)
  - [Publishing automation efforts are underway for DataGrid to reduce manual workload](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

## Topics

### DataGrid Publishing Process

  - [Use Teams account to log into Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Create new blog posts following specific field guidelines from Airtable assignments](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Manually input metadata, dates, categories, and images](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Schedule posts and double-check all elements due to potential CMS glitches](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Publish \~5 articles per day after review and approval](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=657.0)

### Ramp CMS Publishing

  - [Use Sanity CMS for vendor comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Automated table integration simplifies the process](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Select parent and comparison vendors, input content sections](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Insert vendor metrics and feature tables automatically](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Currently experiencing issues with page preview functionality](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1789.0)

### Galileo Inline CTAs

  - [Specific CTAs required for different content clusters (e.g., multi-agents, Rang)](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [E-book CTA always comes first, followed by leaderboard CTA](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Podcast playlist CTAs used for topics outside main clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Publishing on hold during CMS migration](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=1998.0)

### Content Review and Publishing Responsibilities

  - [Nika currently handles review and publishing for DataGrid and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
  - [Usman to get involved in the review process](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2252.0)
  - [Vivek will cover during Nika's absence](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2279.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Usman to review call recording and DataGrid publishing instructions](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2213.0)
  - [Nika to investigate and update on Ramp CMS page preview issue](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [Team to coordinate on splitting the publishing workload](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2245.0)
  - [Nika to provide updates on DataGrid automation progress](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
  - [Usman to assist Vivek with publishing during Nika's absence](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2279.0)
  - [Team to prepare for upcoming Galileo content (9 articles in progress, 4 due today)](https://fathom.video/share/ASWSWs7hRnZraZxw7a1zyLsXygwfGjAy?tab=summary&timestamp=2300.0)
